title: drawio-uml model
description: Single JSON input for the drawio-uml suite, consumed by both generators: draw (model -> .drawio) and table (model -> .md). Machine-readable form of the model schema; the prose spec (docs/spec-ja.md, chapter 3.4) is the SSOT.

name.description: Unique node identifier; referenced by edge source/target.

shape.description: One of: class, entity, object, component, package, box, usecase, actor, state, action, decision, initial, final, note. Unknown values render as box (FR-D-05).

stereotype.description: UML <<...>> tag above the name. interface/abstract italicise the name; object underlines it.

cluster.description: Group path, /-separated (e.g. a/b/c). draw treats it as one opaque label; table interprets the hierarchy.

fill.description: Box fill colour (e.g. #D5E8D4). Authoritative over cluster fill.

style.description: Raw draw.io style string. Suppresses shape preset and compartments (FR-D-10).

description.description: Responsibility (single main line). Ignored by draw; consumed by table (FR-D-08).

remark.description: Side note not shown in attributes (origin, ADR, constraint). Ignored by draw; consumed by table.

target.description: Target node name. If equal to source, draw skips routing (FR-D-15).

arrow.description: One of: generalization, realization, composition, aggregation, directed_association, dependency, transition, association. draw renders unknown/unset values as association (FR-D-06); table outputs the literal value, empty cell when unset (FR-T-03).

label.description: Relation label shown on the edge.

description.description: Ignored by draw; consumed by table.

remark.description: Ignored by draw; consumed by table.

clusters.description: Cluster definitions, keyed by cluster name. Presence triggers the clustered path and the legend (FR-D-12).

layout.description: Banded layout. Presence triggers the clustered path (FR-D-03).

rows.description: Bands of cluster keys. Row 0 is the top band; within a row, left to right (FR-D-04). Must enumerate every cluster key (FR-D-14).

stroke.description: Dashed cluster-box border and legend swatch colour. Defaults to #888888 when a node references an undefined cluster key (FR-D-13).

fill.description: Suggested node fill; per-node fill/stroke remain authoritative.
